data.title: President Trump Says Crypto is Good for the Dollar, Claiming Genius Act Will Ensure America’s Dominance
data.description:
President Trump expresses his belief that cryptocurrency has the potential to be beneficial for the value and stability of the U.S. dollar. He asserts that the implementation of his proposed Genius Act will play a crucial role in securing and maintaining America's financial dominance in the global economy, fostering innovation and competitiveness in the cryptocurrency sector while ultimately strengthening the nation’s currency.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-says-crypto-is-good-for-the-dollar-claiming-genius-act-will-ensure-americas-dominance/

data.title: President Trump Says Crypto is Good for the Dollar, Claiming Genius Act Will Ensure America’s Dominance
data.description:
President Trump has expressed his belief that cryptocurrency is beneficial for the U.S. dollar, asserting that his upcoming legislative proposal, referred to as the Genius Act, will play a crucial role in maintaining and strengthening America's dominance in the global financial landscape. He argues that embracing digital currencies can enhance economic growth and innovation, pushing the boundaries of the traditional financial system while ensuring that the United States remains a leader in the digital economy.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-says-crypto-good-for-the-dollar-claiming-genius-act-will-ensure-americas-dominance/

data.title: XRP Open Interest Just Hit A Fresh ATH Above $10 Billion, Will Price Follow Next?
data.description:
XRP Open Interest (OI) has surged to a new all-time high, surpassing $10 billion across major crypto exchanges. This jump in futures activity comes as the XRP price climbs toward $3. 48, its highest level in years. Historically, rising Open Interest has often coincided with significant price rallies, suggesting the potential for further upside in XRP’s trajectory
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-open-interest-at-ath/

data.title: President Trump Officially Signs Genius Act Into Law: Here is Why This is Game Changing
data.description:
President Trump has officially signed the Genius Act into law, a landmark piece of legislation that is poised to bring about significant changes in various sectors. This groundbreaking act aims to foster innovation and creativity across the nation, promoting advancements in technology, education, and research. Here are the key reasons why the Genius Act is considered a game-changing development that could transform the landscape of American innovation and provide numerous opportunities for individuals and businesses alike.
source: https://blocknews.com/president-trump-officially-signs-genius-act-into-law-here-is-why-this-is-game-changing/

data.title: $342M Raised and 20 Listings Confirmed: Is BlockDAG the Next Big Layer 1 Crypto?
data.description:

data.title: Stocks Primed To Dip in Q3, Says Morgan Stanley’s Chief US Equity Strategist – Here’s How Far They Could Drop in the ‘Quarter of Risk’
data.description:
Stocks could endure a manageable hiccup in the third quarter of the year, according to Mike Wilson, Morgan Stanley’s chief US equity strategist. Wilson tells Bloomberg Television in a new interview that Q3 could witness the moderate impact of tariffs.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/18/stocks-primed-to-dip-in-q3-says-morgan-stanleys-chief-us-equity-strategist-heres-how-far-they-could-drop-in-the-quarter-of-risk/
